description: MT Newswires is a financial news provider that produces real-time, multi-asset market news and distributes it to trading, research, wealth management, and AI platforms. Its offerings include direct newsfeed delivery and MCP-based access to licensed content.
summary: MT Newswires publicly advertises two developer integration surfaces on mtnewswires.com: a licensed direct HTTP newsfeed/API offering and a licensed MCP server for AI workflows; no public GraphQL API, CLI, or machine-readable spec was found.
